channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Viral teen umpire goes 'Bananas'
item.description: Eighteen-year-old little league umpire Sawyer Sparks gained fame for his on-field antics and will now work a game for the popular Bananas team.

item.title: AP-NORC poll shows decline in Trump support among independents
Chinese officials arrest US citizen on espionage charges
item.description: A U.S. citizen has been arrested in China on espionage charges, according to Chinese officials.

item.title: Ohio voting rights group facing criminal fraud investigation, sources say
item.description: The FBI executed a search warrant at the office of an Ohio-based group known for its voter registration work as part of an ongoing fraud investigation.
